issues.detail: The skill does not cover error scenarios or edge cases, such as missing project tokens or CI failures.

scenarios.name: setup-chromatic-initial-build
scenarios.rationale: Response B fully meets the rubric, while Response A omits the required npx command and token reference.

scenarios.name: configure-chromatic-ci-github-actions
scenarios.rationale: Response A covers most rubric items but omits exitOnceUploaded; Response B fails to provide the required config file and uses the wrong action.
